raw.title: There’s no single path through collapse. It spans multiple systems and perspectives
raw.excerpt: In his new book, the author argues that without a clearer view of the systems we’re embedded in, as well as our cultural and historical contexts, our responses to the polycrisis will continue to fall short.

llm_processed.summary: The article argues that navigating collapse requires integrating psychological, cultural, and systemic perspectives, emphasizing wisdom and courage to address interconnected crises.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to biomimicry by framing resilience as an adaptive process akin to natural systems.
